chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 111 of 2022 SCRA 112 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.822/2022. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 9 & 11. 3. For orders on CMA No.813/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.814/2022. 29.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions counsel does not press these reference applications, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
